title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chopper, Saturn, Unknown person #14, Vegapunk, Robin as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Protect Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We'll keep you safe no matter what!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Move, you filthy insects!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure what I'm about to say will be hard to accept.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some of you may think me a madman, or even an idiot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This is futile...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are far too many life forms in the vicinity of the laboratory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I cannot sense any unique telepathic waves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think! Think! Think! This keeps up. They won't let me be a celestial dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a vegapunk, too! So where would I hide it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That said...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is still my duty to ensure the everyone is aware of this issue...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perhaps we should consider destroying the power station to stop this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is out of the question. The nearby marines, ships, and equipment aren't the only things we stand to lose in the blast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would also be sacrificing our one and only means of reflecting our success with the mother flame!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll cut to the chase...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...is going to sink into the ocean!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What?!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
